positives: Continuous coverage from 2020 through 2024 with established carriers

concerns: Elevated claim count in 2024 (11 claims) - highest in the five-year period

risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Five-year loss history shows claim counts of 2 (2020), 9 (2021), 6 (2022), 3 (2023), and 11 (2024), with a cancellation in 2022. Total premiums from 2020-2023 ranged approximately $580K-$631K annually.

extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: Prior insurance history spans 2020-2024 with five different carriers: EMPLOYERS Insurance Group (2020, 2 claims), Chubb Limited (2021, 9 claims), Zurich Insurance Group (2022, 6 claims - cancelled), Markel Corporation (2023, 3 claims), and unnamed carrier (2024, 11 claims). Premiums ranged from $580,805.53 to $630,843.20.
